label: Ashvault Stores Niche
description: Ashvault Stores Niche serves as the sealed stowage annex of Ashvault Hab-Cell, constructed as a shallow ferrocrete recess framed by void-black bracing. Ration tins, sealed water canisters, and standardized equipment bins occupy numbered shelves behind a gasketed panel door, each bay fitted with tally slates for strict inventory control. Recessed lumen strips provide a cold, even illumination that emphasizes scoured, decontamination-ready surfaces and the absence of decorative finish. The air remains dry with recycled filtration, and the only fittings are utilitarian restraints, tool hooks, and a narrow floor channel for washdown runoff.
